creator: emz@norma.perm.ru
text: And I'm currently testing trasz@ patch of session termination crash - we hoped it may have something to do with this issue too, but I just got identical one when running with patch (and still no crashes with patch - seems like it resolves them) - so seems like this is a separate one from the https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=222898 .
